tasks.title: Python task graph extractor
tasks.goal: Create scripts/extract-task-graph.py to ingest/export Sheet or CSV task graph rows into generated/task_graph.raw.json.
tasks.verification_gate: Script produces raw JSON rows without dropping columns; malformed rows fail loudly.
tasks.rollback_plan: Delete generated raw file; preserve source sheet/CSV.
tasks.next_action: Implement extractor against CSV first; Sheet API later.

source_columns.title: Python task graph extractor
source_columns.goal: Create scripts/extract-task-graph.py to ingest/export Sheet or CSV task graph rows into generated/task_graph.raw.json.
source_columns.inputs: Task Graph v0 sheet or CSV export
source_columns.verification_gate: Script produces raw JSON rows without dropping columns; malformed rows fail loudly.
source_columns.rollback_plan: Delete generated raw file; preserve source sheet/CSV.
source_columns.next_action: Implement extractor against CSV first; Sheet API later.

inputs: Task Graph v0 sheet or CSV export

tasks.title: Normalize task graph JSON
tasks.goal: Create scripts/normalize-task-graph.py to validate required columns, normalize booleans/lists, enforce task IDs, and emit generated/task_graph.normalized.json + task_graph.index.json.
tasks.verification_gate: Fails if any task lacks allowed_paths, blocked_paths, verification_gate, rollback_plan, proof_uri, or execution_cell.
tasks.rollback_plan: Keep raw JSON and emit validation error report.

source_columns.title: Normalize task graph JSON
source_columns.goal: Create scripts/normalize-task-graph.py to validate required columns, normalize booleans/lists, enforce task IDs, and emit generated/task_graph.normalized.json + task_graph.index.json.
source_columns.verification_gate: Fails if any task lacks allowed_paths, blocked_paths, verification_gate, rollback_plan, proof_uri, or execution_cell.
source_columns.rollback_plan: Keep raw JSON and emit validation error report.

tasks.title: Build JSON execution packets
tasks.goal: Create scripts/build-execution-packets.py to produce one bounded execution_packets/<TASK_ID>.json file per Ready task.
tasks.verification_gate: Each packet includes task_id, paths, cell, verification gate, rollback plan, proof_uri, source_graph_uri, generated_at, packet_schema_version.
tasks.rollback_plan: Delete generated packets and rebuild from normalized graph.
tasks.next_action: Do not include full doc prose in packets.

source_columns.title: Build JSON execution packets
source_columns.goal: Create scripts/build-execution-packets.py to produce one bounded execution_packets/<TASK_ID>.json file per Ready task.
source_columns.verification_gate: Each packet includes task_id, paths, cell, verification gate, rollback plan, proof_uri, source_graph_uri, generated_at, packet_schema_version.
source_columns.rollback_plan: Delete generated packets and rebuild from normalized graph.
source_columns.next_action: Do not include full doc prose in packets.

tasks.title: Validate execution packet
tasks.goal: Create scripts/validate-execution-packet.py to verify one packet before any agent consumes it.
tasks.verification_gate: A packet is invalid if it lacks scope, verification, rollback, proof, owner, or cell.
tasks.rollback_plan: Reject invalid packet; do not mutate workspace.
tasks.next_action: Wire into Bun verify if useful, but Python remains required.

source_columns.title: Validate execution packet
source_columns.goal: Create scripts/validate-execution-packet.py to verify one packet before any agent consumes it.
source_columns.verification_gate: A packet is invalid if it lacks scope, verification, rollback, proof, owner, or cell.
source_columns.rollback_plan: Reject invalid packet; do not mutate workspace.
source_columns.next_action: Wire into Bun verify if useful, but Python remains required.

tasks.title: Merge proof records
tasks.goal: Create scripts/merge-proof-records.py to collect proof_records/*.proof.json into proof_records/proof_ledger.jsonl.
tasks.verification_gate: Proof ledger is append-only; duplicate task IDs must reconcile by revision or fail.
tasks.rollback_plan: Preserve existing proof files; write new ledger revision.

source_columns.title: Merge proof records
source_columns.goal: Create scripts/merge-proof-records.py to collect proof_records/*.proof.json into proof_records/proof_ledger.jsonl.
source_columns.verification_gate: Proof ledger is append-only; duplicate task IDs must reconcile by revision or fail.
source_columns.rollback_plan: Preserve existing proof files; write new ledger revision.

tasks.title: Update task graph status from proof
tasks.goal: Create scripts/update-task-graph-status.py to update statuses from proof results without changing goals, paths, or gates.
tasks.verification_gate: Only status/proof_uri/next_action fields may be updated by this script.

source_columns.title: Update task graph status from proof
source_columns.goal: Create scripts/update-task-graph-status.py to update statuses from proof results without changing goals, paths, or gates.
source_columns.verification_gate: Only status/proof_uri/next_action fields may be updated by this script.

tasks.title: Package execution bundle
tasks.goal: Create scripts/package-execution-bundle.py to package normalized graph, packets, schemas, examples, and proof ledger into a transferable execution bundle.
tasks.verification_gate: Bundle excludes secrets, includes manifest, and validates before packaging.
tasks.rollback_plan: Delete dist bundle; source artifacts remain.
tasks.next_action: Use for Codex handoff and future reruns.

source_columns.title: Package execution bundle
source_columns.goal: Create scripts/package-execution-bundle.py to package normalized graph, packets, schemas, examples, and proof ledger into a transferable execution bundle.
source_columns.verification_gate: Bundle excludes secrets, includes manifest, and validates before packaging.
source_columns.rollback_plan: Delete dist bundle; source artifacts remain.
source_columns.next_action: Use for Codex handoff and future reruns.

tasks.title: Accurate current state map
tasks.goal: Map the current local machine/repo state so ChatGPT can plan from observed reality: directory tree graph, repos on disk, related FlexNetOS/LifeOS folders, Nix/Yazelix surfaces, /usr dependency surfaces, generated artifacts, verification commands, and drift from the intended planning-spine package.
tasks.verification_gate: State map must be generated from observed filesystem/repo commands, include command log and exclusions, identify all git repos, show current branch/HEAD/dirty state, summarize Nix/Yazelix and /usr surfaces without dumping secrets or huge store contents, and produce machine-readable JSON plus human-readable Markdown.
tasks.rollback_plan: Delete generated state files; no workspace mutation beyond state/** and proof_records/**.
tasks.next_action: Reconciled into sheet. Next absorb LPS-020/LPS-021/LPS-022 proof surfaces, then resume LPS-012.

source_columns.title: Accurate current state map
source_columns.goal: Map the current local machine/repo state so ChatGPT can plan from observed reality: directory tree graph, repos on disk, related FlexNetOS/LifeOS folders, Nix/Yazelix surfaces, /usr dependency surfaces, generated artifacts, verification commands, and drift from the intended planning-spine package.
source_columns.inputs: /home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS; /home/flexnetos; /nix/store metadata; /usr metadata; current git repos; planning-spine-v0 artifacts
source_columns.target_artifacts: state/current_state_map.md; state/current_state_map.json; state/repo_inventory.json; state/tree_snapshot.txt; state/nix_surface_report.json; state/usr_surface_report.json; proof_records/LPS-019.proof.json
source_columns.allowed_paths: /home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS/**; /home/flexnetos/** read-only; /nix/store read-only metadata; /usr read-only metadata; state/**; proof_records/**
source_columns.blocked_paths: secrets/**; private keys; token files; wallet files; credential values; full /nix/store content copy; destructive commands; mutation outside state/** and proof_records/**
source_columns.verification_gate: State map must be generated from observed filesystem/repo commands, include command log and exclusions, identify all git repos, show current branch/HEAD/dirty state, summarize Nix/Yazelix and /usr surfaces without dumping secrets or huge store contents, and produce machine-readable JSON plus human-readable Markdown.
source_columns.rollback_plan: Delete generated state files; no workspace mutation beyond state/** and proof_records/**.
source_columns.next_action: Reconciled into sheet. Next absorb LPS-020/LPS-021/LPS-022 proof surfaces, then resume LPS-012.

tasks.title: Repair verification frontdoor
tasks.goal: Align the verifier entrypoint with the actual Bun runtime used by the local planning-spine package.
tasks.verification_gate: bun run planning-spine:verify passes and records runtime findings.
tasks.rollback_plan: Revert verifier entrypoint if validation fails.
tasks.next_action: Completed locally per Codex; retained as observed proof surface.

tasks.title: Connected MVP bundle verification
tasks.goal: Add and verify a connected MVP bundle manifest covering the full v0 chain from intent through artifact.
tasks.verification_gate: Verifier confirms the MVP object chain is connected and valid.
tasks.rollback_plan: Regenerate bundle/report from schemas and examples if validation fails.
tasks.next_action: Completed locally per Codex; retained as observed proof surface.

tasks.title: Verifier authority integrity
tasks.goal: Make verifier authority explicit and machine-readable so proof is tied to a distinct verifier role and capability chain.
tasks.verification_gate: Verifier authority is distinct from executor authority and passes integrity checks.
tasks.rollback_plan: Regenerate authority report from source examples if validation fails.
tasks.next_action: Completed locally per Codex; after reconciliation resume LPS-012.

source_columns.title: Verifier authority integrity
source_columns.goal: Make verifier authority explicit and machine-readable so proof is tied to a distinct verifier role and capability chain.
source_columns.inputs: authority graph; proof records; verifier output
source_columns.blocked_paths: unbounded authority expansion; outside approved package scope
source_columns.verification_gate: Verifier authority is distinct from executor authority and passes integrity checks.
source_columns.rollback_plan: Regenerate authority report from source examples if validation fails.
source_columns.next_action: Completed locally per Codex; after reconciliation resume LPS-012.
